description: Contribly provides tools for newsrooms to collect, moderate, process, and publish user-generated content from readers and contributors. Its product supports submission workflows, media handling, moderation, and distribution of contributed content.
summary: Contribly exposes one documented REST API at https://api.contribly.com/1 with Swagger/OpenAPI documentation; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found, and authentication requirements could not be determined from the available public docs.
